title: ayenia elliptica
intro: Ayenia elliptica, also known as 'Lemon Drop', is a small, shrub-like plant belonging to the Malpighiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ayenia elliptica include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Ayenia elliptica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
